title: Sponsor Student Memberships
description: The U.S. Naval Institute provides an independent forum for those who seek to advance and strengthen the naval profession.
text:
Arizona State University
South Central
Sponsor Arizona State University Midshipmen
To learn more about how you can sponsor gratis memberships for Arizona State University, contact the foundation team at foundation@usni.org.
